messages.content: I can't check live weather. Want me to open the weather app?
How do I boil an egg?
Bring water to a rolling boil. Add the egg, cook 6 minutes for soft, 9 for hard. Ice bath when done.
Remind me to call mom tomorrow.
Got it — reminder set for tomorrow to call your mom.
I don't have a clock handy. Your device's clock will know.

I can't pull live traffic. Try your maps app for a live ETA.
I can't start playback directly, but any lo-fi or ambient station works well for focus.

A function that solves a problem by calling itself on a smaller version of the same problem.

That's tough. A short walk or three slow breaths can help reset. Want a breathing exercise?
A text file that tells Docker how to build a container image: base OS, dependencies, and how to run your app.
How do I stay focused while studying?
Block notifications, pick one task, use a 25 minute timer, then take a 5 minute break.
Pasta with garlic, olive oil, and whatever greens you have. Fifteen minutes, minimal cleanup.
HTTP over TLS. The connection to the server is encrypted so nobody in between can read or tamper with it.
Water first, then light movement for ten minutes, then three priorities written down before you open email.
What's the difference between HTTP and HTTPS?
HTTPS encrypts the traffic between you and the server; HTTP doesn't. Everything else is the same protocol.
Octopuses have three hearts and blue blood. Two hearts pump blood to the gills, one to the rest of the body.
